examples: PAVLOS TSIMAS: "... where social and family life is more traditional, more patriarchic."
In British literary history, many writers recall simple and unsophisticated society of patriarchic clan system to seek their dreamed paradise through their own creation.
After several thousand years' of patriarchic society and the consequent male-dominant culture, the existence of "Feminist Art" in its true sense in China is questioned, as it should be.
